title: NIAB – Senior Research Fellow – 1 Posts
shortInfo: BRIC-National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Senior Research Fellow post. Candidates with MVSc, M.Tech, MSc, NET/GATE qualification can apply online. The online application closes on 04-06-2026. Candidates can apply through the NIAB official website, niab.org.in.

basic_details.job_title: NIAB Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: BRIC-National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) Recruitment 2026 for 1 Senior Research Fellow post. Candidates with MVSc, M.Tech, MSc, NET/GATE qualification can apply online. The online application closes on 04-06-2026. Candidates can apply through the NIAB official website, niab.org.in.

qualification.education_qualification: MVSc. / M.Tech. / MSc. Degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Immunology with 2 years' experience in R&D in the related area. NET/GATE qualified as per DST Guidelines.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIAB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: BRIC-National Institute of Animal Biotechnology Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026
